title: syntherisma ciliaris
intro: Syntherisma ciliaris is a plant species also known as False Buttonweed, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Syntherisma ciliaris include its ability to soothe irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Syntherisma ciliaris can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant in a topical ointment or salve.
